generated_oml:
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of a 6-axis robot for machining tasks"
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current (I_M) for the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft for rotational position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox for rotational position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current (I_M) data stream transmitted via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Rotational position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model with Internal Block Diagrams for component interfaces and composition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton behavioral model using state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcEnabler
]

instance SimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink analytical simulation model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling across requirements, functional, logical, and technical abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance MBSEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MBSE methodologies including RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Step-by-step twinning process: problem identification, asset and model analysis, model creation, data identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionControlService
]

instance MotionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Precise motion control service for the first vertical axis of the robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionControlAction
]

instance MotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Precise motion control action for the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotFirstVerticalAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of a 6-axis robot used in manufacturing for machining tasks"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Complex production environment for machining tasks"
    base:contains RobotFirstVerticalAxis
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for transmitting time series sensor data (e.g., input current I_M and output angle) from physical to digital components. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Industry standards such as SysML, ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and methodologies including RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are adopted for system modeling, enabling component & connector-based descriptions across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer) and integration of heterogeneous stakeholders and tools."
]
